case_title: ELENA POPESCU VS. YVONNE TORACCA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60807380)
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-04-2017.
ARBITRATOR MARK RICHARD CARBONE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-05-2017 THROUGH AUG-03-2017.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-05-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PHILIP SOCHAT KEITH.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100024382) FILED BY DEFENDANT TORACCA, YVONNE GIOVANNI & YVONNE TORACCA REVOCABLE TRUST

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POPESCU, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT TORACCA, YVONNE GIOVANNI & YVONNE TORACCA REVOCABLE TRUST DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-15-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-23-2017
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-17-2017. THE FEB-15-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
